summary: Part 3 full backend + frontend testing. 7/7 pytest tests pass (chat streaming w/ session context, newsletter valid/duplicate/invalid, leads regression w/ source=contact_form). All Part 3 UI features verified: AI Consultant launcher/panel/suggestions/streaming reply/CTA links, Contact split section (6 info tiles with correct tel/wa/mailto hrefs, form submits -> success shown), Map section (iframe + directions/call/whatsapp hrefs + info card), Premium footer (4 columns + newsletter subscribe + back-to-top scrolls to 0 + social/privacy toasts), Floating actions (hidden at top, appear after scroll, correct hrefs, book btn scrolls to hero form), 3 CTA bands (all render with book/whatsapp buttons scrolling to hero form), SEO meta og:title + twitter:card + 2 ld+json schemas verified in DOM. No horizontal overflow at 1920 or 390. No JS console errors. AI panel fits within 390px viewport (355x520, right edge 366<390).
critical_code_review_comments: SEO meta tags in index.html were not being served until frontend was restarted — dev server had stale index.html cache. Non-blocking (rebuild/restart on deploy resolves). Consider using react-helmet-async in the future for dynamic head management.

CHAT_SESSIONS in-memory dict in server.py evicts oldest at 300 sessions — fine for MVP but no persistence across backend restarts and won't scale horizontally. Consider Redis if multiple backend workers used.
Newsletter endpoint returns {status: 'subscribed'} even for duplicates — good idempotent UX; no need for change.
Chat endpoint has no rate limiting — could be abused to burn Emergent LLM credits. Add per-session/IP rate limit for production.
seed_data_creation: Created ~4 TEST_ leads (from part3 regression + contact form UI submission), 3 newsletter subscribers with test_nl_/test_news_/test_dup_ prefixes, chat message records for 3 test sessions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend dev server may serve stale index.html after edits to /app/frontend/public/index.html — restart frontend via supervisor if SEO/meta tag changes don't reflect. Chat streaming responses take ~5-10s to fully arrive; use stream=True in requests and wait ~12s in Playwright. Contact form marketplace/monthly-sales selects are NATIVE <select> — use page.select_option(value=...). Back-to-top uses Lenis smooth scroll — needs ~5s wait to complete from bottom of page. FloatingActions is unmounted at scrollY=0 (querySelector returns null) — check by scrolling >700px first.
